nasb.text: With the sacrifice of his peace offerings for thanksgiving, he shall present his offering with cakes of leavened bread.

esv.text: With the sacrifice of his peace offerings for thanksgiving he shall bring his offering with loaves of leavened bread.

cnv.text: 他要把他的供物，連同有酵的餅，跟那為感恩而獻的平安祭，一起獻上。
